description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI [RPI] that runs on push and pull request events for devel and release branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow consists of two jobs: RPI and RPI-Integration. The RPI job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs the RPI toolchain, runs F prime CI tests, copies test artifacts, and uploads build and log artifacts. The RPI-Integration job runs on a self-hosted raspberrypi environment, depends on the RPI job, checks out requirements.txt, sets up a Python environment, downloads RPI build artifacts, runs RPI integration tests, and uploads log artifacts.
